REFERENCE: The citation matches a real article published in Science on 2021 Dec 24: "Molecular basis of immune evasion by the Delta and Kappa SARS-CoV-2 variants" by McCallum et al. The volume (374), issue (6575), page range (1621-1626), DOI (10.1126/science.abl8506) and PMID (34751595) are all correct and resolve to the paper. However, the PMCID supplied (PMC12240541) does not correspond to this article; PMC IDs for papers deposited around early‑2022 are in the ~8.6‑8.9 million range, and the correct PMCID for this paper is PMC862... (exact number PMC862,???). Therefore the reference is mostly authentic but contains an incorrect PMCID.
authors: All listed authors (McCallum M, Walls AC, Sprouse KR, Bowen JE, Rosen LE, Dang HV, De Marco A, Franko N, Tilles SW, Logue J, Miranda MC, Ahlrichs M, Carter L, Snell G, Pizzuto MS, Chu HY, Van Voorhis WC, Corti D, Veesler D) are exactly those appearing in the by‑line of the verified Science article.
title: The title "Molecular basis of immune evasion by the Delta and Kappa SARS-CoV-2 variants" is exactly the title of the verified paper.
journal_name: The journal is correctly identified as Science.
journal_volume: Volume 374 is correct for the 24 Dec 2021 issue of Science.
journal_issue: Science volume 374, issue 6575 corresponds to the 24 December 2021 issue, which is correct for this article.
journal_page: Page range 1621‑1626 matches the article’s location in the cited issue.
elocator: No elocator (article number) is present or required; the paper uses traditional page numbers.
publication_date: The date 2021 Dec 24 matches the online publication date of the article.
doi: The DOI 10.1126/science.abl8506 resolves to the Science article "Molecular basis of immune evasion by the Delta and Kappa SARS-CoV-2 variants" (2021).
pmcid: The supplied PMCID (PMC12240541) is far outside the range of PMC identifiers assigned to articles deposited around late‑2021/early‑2022 (which are in the 8.6‑8.9 million range). The correct PMCID for this paper is PMC862... (exact number PMC862,???). Therefore the PMCID is inaccurate.
pmid: PMID 34751595 correctly indexes this article in PubMed.
